title: aster lasiocarpus
intro: Aster lasiocarpus, also known as Frost Aster or Frost Daisy, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aster lasiocarpus can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal remedies, and its roots and leaves can be dried and used in various herbal preparations.
